overall.description: Third-person survival horror gameplay footage showing a character exploring the exterior of a suburban house at night using a flashlight. The character enters through a metal gate, crosses a wooden bridge over water, and examines the porch and sides of the house in a tense, atmospheric setting with detailed environmental storytelling.

events.description: character opens metal gate and enters the property

agents.ego_description: approaching and opening the metal gate to enter the property while sweeping flashlight across the entrance

entered.detail: ornate black metal gate with vertical bars, partially illuminated by flashlight
stone pillar supporting the left side of the gate
exterior wall of the house with wooden siding
tall grass and weeds growing along the fence line

segments.scene_description: The character stands before a closed metal gate at night, illuminated only by flashlight. The gate opens, revealing the dark property beyond with the house wall visible to the right and overgrown vegetation to the left.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the side of the house through the grassy yard

entered.detail: warm yellow lights visible in the distance beyond the yard
tall dark trees silhouetted against the night sky
small wooden arched bridge visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Moving along the side of the house through a grassy yard, the character approaches a wooden bridge visible in the distance. The house wall runs along the right side while trees and distant lights appear ahead.

events.description: character steps onto the wooden bridge and begins crossing

agents.ego_description: carefully crossing the wooden bridge over water while sweeping the flashlight across the railings

entered.detail: dark water visible beneath and beside the bridge
low stone retaining wall along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and crosses a small wooden arched bridge over dark water. Stone walls line the water's edge, and the house becomes visible again on the far side of the bridge.

events.description: character approaches the illuminated porch, mixing flashlight with warm exterior lamp light

agents.ego_description: walking toward the illuminated porch and examining the french doors and entrance area

entered.detail: covered porch with white painted wooden columns and railings
warm glowing exterior wall lantern illuminating the entrance
glass panel doors with white frames leading into the house
wooden rocking chair sitting on the porch

segments.scene_description: Exiting the bridge, the character approaches a well-lit porch with warm exterior lighting. A rocking chair sits to the left, and french doors with glass panels mark the entrance to the house.

events.description: character looks up at the roof and porch overhang, then continues along the porch

agents.ego_description: examining the porch details, looking up at the roof structure, then moving along the side of the house

entered.detail: green wheeled trash bins with lids
dense green shrubbery along the side of the house
large rock or boulder in the yard area

segments.scene_description: The character explores the porch area, looking up at the roof and overhang, then moves along the side of the house past trash bins and dense bushes. The flashlight reveals a large rock formation in the yard beyond.

events.description: character rounds the corner and returns to view the side porch from a different angle

agents.ego_description: circling around the side of the house, examining the exterior walls and vegetation before returning toward the porch area

entered.detail: secondary entrance porch with columns and overhead light

segments.scene_description: Continuing around the house, the character passes through a narrow side yard with dense vegetation and trash bins, then rounds the corner to approach a side porch with another illuminated entrance, completing a circuit of the house exterior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a restricted entrance through a dark, overgrown yard toward the illuminated porches of a suburban house. It begins before a closed metal gate that swings open to reveal a dim property, with the camera moving past a house wall and dense vegetation toward a distant wooden bridge. As the character crosses the arched bridge over dark water lined with stone walls, the scene shifts from the shadows of the yard to the warm, inviting glow of a lit porch featuring a rocking chair and glass french doors. The camera then explores the roof overhang and moves past trash bins and a large rock formation, weaving through narrow side yards filled with thick bushes. Finally, the movement rounds the corner of the building to approach a second illuminated side entrance, completing a circuit of the house exterior.
